testcase.classname: async task fetch fetches task data asynchronously
testcase.name: async task fetch fetches task data asynchronously

testcase.classname: GET /health returns ok status
testcase.name: GET /health returns ok status

testcase.classname: POST /tasks creates a task with valid input
testcase.name: POST /tasks creates a task with valid input

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty

testcase.classname: GET /tasks returns empty list when no tasks exist
testcase.name: GET /tasks returns empty list when no tasks exist

testcase.classname: GET /tasks returns all tasks
testcase.name: GET /tasks returns all tasks

testcase.classname: GET /tasks/:id returns a task by id
testcase.name: GET /tasks/:id returns a task by id

testcase.classname: GET /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: GET /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task
testcase.name: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task

testcase.classname: DELETE /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: DELETE /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with all valid fields
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with all valid fields

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with only title
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with only title

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with title at max length (200 chars)
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with title at max length (200 chars)

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with priority low
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with priority low

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with priority medium
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs creates task with priority medium

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs trims whitespace from title
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Valid inputs trims whitespace from title

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is missing
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is null
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is null

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is not a string
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is not a string

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is empty string
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is empty string

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is only whitespace
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is only whitespace

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is invalid
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is invalid

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is empty string
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is empty string

testcase.classname: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is a number
testcase.name: POST /tasks - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is a number

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid title
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid title

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid status
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid status

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with status done
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with status done

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with status pending
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with status pending

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid priority
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with valid priority

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with multiple valid fields
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with multiple valid fields

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with title at max length (200 chars)
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs updates task with title at max length (200 chars)

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs trims whitespace from title on update
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs trims whitespace from title on update

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs allows empty body (no updates)
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Valid inputs allows empty body (no updates)

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is empty string
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is empty string

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is only whitespace
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is only whitespace

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is not a string
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title is not a string

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is invalid
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is invalid

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is empty string
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is empty string

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is a number
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when status is a number

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is invalid
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is invalid

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is empty string
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is empty string

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is a number
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id - Validation Invalid inputs returns 400 when priority is a number
